title: Admission Control: Client, Service, and Proxy Layers
excerpt: A deep dive into the three layers of admission control — client-side concurrency limits, service-side in-flight counting, and Envoy proxy circuit breakers — with Go examples and comparisons to load shedding, backpressure, throttling, and rate limiting.

title: Probability in a Stream: Exact vs Approximate Design
excerpt: A practical walk-through of the streaming distribution problem, with exact design, chi-square uniformity, and the memory-bounded variant.

title: Python Threading Primitives and Queues (and asyncio)
excerpt: A practical guide to Python threading primitives, queue.Queue, asyncio.Queue, and when to use asyncio.to_thread.

title: Bursty Traffic: Queue Growth and Control Patterns
excerpt: A pragmatic playbook for handling bursty traffic with rate limiting, load shedding, backpressure, and retry control, plus a Dynamo-style case study.

title: Tiktoken vs SentencePiece: Methodology, BPE, and When to Use Each
excerpt: A practical comparison of tiktoken and SentencePiece, including how BPE works, high-level pseudocode, and which model families use each.

title: When Time Complexity Lies (And What Actually Matters)
excerpt: Why Big-O can mislead in production and what to pay attention to instead: constants, cache behavior, input ranges, and p99 latency.

title: Smooth Text Streaming in React + Next.js (OpenAI API)
excerpt: How to render OpenAI streaming responses smoothly in React and Next.js using requestAnimationFrame batching and UI-friendly buffering.

title: LLM Jailbreaking in Practice
excerpt: A grounded overview of jailbreaks, prompt injection, and layered defenses, with references to OWASP, OpenAI evals, and current research.

title: Ever Wonder Why Livegrep Is So Fast?
excerpt: A practical breakdown of how Livegrep works, why indexed search feels instant, and how it compares to GitHub Code Search, Google Code Search, and grep.app.

title: Latency Ladder for Pragmatic Engineers
excerpt: A practical latency cheat sheet across caches, RTT, TCP/TLS handshakes, and LLM TTFT decomposition.

title: OSI Model for Pragmatic Engineers
excerpt: A practical OSI guide focused on debugging flow, fault isolation, and where latency hides in real systems.

title: Similarity Systems in Production: A Latency Playbook
excerpt: A pragmatic guide to autocorrect, typeahead, and web-crawl dedup through the lens of latency, memory, and implementation tradeoffs.

title: US West to US East RTT: The Number, The Floor, and the Lie
excerpt: A practical latency deep-dive: coast-to-coast RTT ranges, physics floors, handshake amplification, and how to budget for p95/p99 reality.

title: LLM Inference: From Zero to Modern
excerpt: A practical bottom-up guide to modern LLM serving: KV cache, continuous batching, PagedAttention, speculative decoding, and disaggregated prefill/decode.

title: Production LLM Streaming Architecture
excerpt: How to build resilient token streaming with SSE, Redis Streams, replayable offsets, and clean cancellation semantics.

title: Database Indexing: A Deep Dive
excerpt: Understanding how database indexes work and when to use them effectively.

title: Building Resilient Systems
excerpt: Strategies for designing systems that gracefully handle failures and recover quickly.

title: API Rate Limiting: Best Practices
excerpt: Implementing effective rate limiting strategies to protect your APIs from abuse.
